title: coreopsis oaxacensis
intro: Coreopsis oaxacensis, also known as Golden Tickseed, is a flowering plant species within the daisy family, Asteraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Coreopsis oaxacensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in folk medicine, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects on human health.
